summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ViralScout Market Intelligence Reports feature. Backend: 28/28 API tests passed. Frontend: All public report pages working correctly with proper data display and access control.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/reports/ returns list of reports with latest refs
Backend: GET /api/reports/ respects report_type filter
Backend: GET /api/reports/weekly-winning-products returns report with sections
Backend: Weekly report has free sections (Trend Stage Analysis, Competition Analysis) unlocked
Backend: Weekly report has Pro sections (Top 20, Clusters, Margin) locked for free users
Backend: Weekly report has Elite sections (Saturation Warning) locked
Backend: GET /api/reports/monthly-market-trends returns report with sections
Backend: Monthly report has emerging categories with data
Backend: Monthly report includes market health assessment
Backend: GET /api/reports/public/weekly-winning-products returns preview with top 5 products
Backend: Public weekly has locked margin details showing 'Unlock for details'
Backend: GET /api/reports/public/monthly-market-trends returns preview with top 3 emerging
Backend: Public monthly has market snapshot and demand/competition summary
Backend: GET /api/reports/history/weekly_winning_products returns history with access limits
Backend: GET /api/reports/history/monthly_market_trends works correctly
Backend: Invalid report type returns 400 error
Backend: Free user history limited to 3 reports
Backend: Authenticated access returns is_authenticated=true
Frontend: /reports/weekly-winning-products loads public preview page
Frontend: Public weekly shows Free Weekly Report badge
Frontend: Public weekly displays Top 5 Winning Products with success %, trend stage, competition
Frontend: Public weekly shows Trend Distribution and Competition Snapshot sections
Frontend: Public weekly has locked margin details (Unlock for details)
Frontend: Public weekly has unlock CTA and sign-up buttons
Frontend: /reports/monthly-market-trends loads public preview page
Frontend: Public monthly shows Free Monthly Report badge
Frontend: Public monthly displays Top 3 Emerging Categories with growth %
Frontend: Public monthly shows Demand vs Competition analysis
Frontend: Public monthly has unlock CTA and sign-up buttons
Frontend: Browse All Reports redirects to login (protected route working)
critical_code_review_comments: Report generators properly save reports to MongoDB with is_latest flag management
Access control filtering by subscription tier (free/pro/elite) correctly implemented
Section-level locking with unlock_message properly shows upgrade prompts
Public preview endpoints exclude sensitive data (margin details) for SEO pages
seed_data_creation: Reports auto-generated on first request if not exists
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reports feature fully implemented. Public pages: /reports/weekly-winning-products (SEO), /reports/monthly-market-trends (SEO). Protected pages: /reports (listing), /reports/weekly/:slug, /reports/monthly/:slug. APIs: GET /api/reports/, /weekly-winning-products, /monthly-market-trends, /public/*, /history/{type}. Subscription tiers: free (limited sections), pro (most sections), elite (all sections). Weekly report slug format: '2026-week-11', monthly: '2026-march'.

mocked_apis.Data Sources: SIMULATED - TikTok, Amazon, AliExpress, CJ Dropshipping data is simulated
mocked_apis.Intelligence Layer: RULES-BASED - Uses deterministic scoring algorithms for products and reports

features_tested.reports_list_api: Working - Returns available reports with latest weekly/monthly refs
features_tested.weekly_report_api: Working - Auto-generates if none exists, filters sections by user plan
features_tested.monthly_report_api: Working - Auto-generates if none exists, includes market health assessment
features_tested.public_weekly_preview: Working - Shows top 5 products with locked margins for SEO
features_tested.public_monthly_preview: Working - Shows top 3 emerging categories with growth data
features_tested.report_history_api: Working - Returns historical reports with access limits by plan
features_tested.public_report_pages: Working - Both weekly and monthly public pages render correctly
